questions.question: и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $f(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}a x+b, & 0<x<1 \\ 0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$, дё?$E(X)=\frac{1}{3}$, еҲ?$a, b$ зҡ„еҖјеҗ„дё?() .
questions.analysis:
з”ұжҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰзҡ„жҖ§иҙЁзҹ? $\int_0^1(a x+b) d x=1$,еҸҲз”ұж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣзҡ„е®ҡд№үзҹҘпј?$\int_0^1 x(a x+b) d x=\frac{1}{3}$.
$\left\{\begin{array}{l}\frac{a}{2}+b=1 \\ \frac{a}{3}+\frac{b}{2}=\frac{1}{3}\end{array}\right.$,ж•?$a=-2, b=2$.

questions.question: е…·жңүдёӢеҲ—жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰзҡ„йҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸдёӯ, ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣдёҚеӯҳеңЁзҡ„жҳ?( ).
questions.analysis: еҜ№иҝһз»ӯеһӢйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ, жұӮдёҖйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸзҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжң? йҰ–е…ҲжҳҜеҲӨж–ӯз§ҜеҲ?$\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x$ жҳҜеҗҰз»қеҜ№ж”¶ж•ӣ.з”ұдәҺ $\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty}\left|x \cdot \frac{1}{\pi\left(1+x^2\right)}\right| d x=2 \int_0^{+\infty} \frac{x}{\pi\left(1+x^2\right)} d x=\left.\frac{1}{\pi} \ln \left(1+x^2\right)\right|_0 ^{+\infty}=+\infty$,ж•…иӢҘеҜҶеәҰеҮҪж•°дё?$\varphi_4(x)=\frac{1}{\pi\left(1+x^2\right)}$, еҲҷж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣжҳҜдёҚеӯҳеңЁзҡ„.

questions.question: и®ҫиҝһз»ӯеһӢйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ $X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $F(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}0, & x \leq 0 \\ \frac{x}{4}, & 0<x \leq 4 \\ 1, & x>4\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$E(X)=()$.
questions.analysis: йҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ $X$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $f(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{c}\frac{1}{4}, 0<x<4 \\ 0, \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$, ж•?$E(X)=\int_0^4 \frac{1}{4} x d x=2$.

questions.question: и®ҫжЎғж ‘зҡ„зӣҙеҫ„ $X$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $f(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{cl}\frac{4}{\pi\left(1+x^2\right)}, & 0<x<1 \\ 0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$E(X)=()$.
questions.analysis: $E(X)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x=\int_0^1 \frac{4 x}{\pi\left(1+x^2\right)} d x=\left.\frac{2}{\pi}\left[\ln \left(1+x^2\right)\right]\right|_0 ^1=\frac{2}{\pi} \ln 2=\frac{\ln 4}{\pi}$.

questions.question: иӢҘйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$\xi$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $\varphi(x)=\begin{cases} 1-|x|, & |x| \leq 1 \\ 0, & |x|>1 \end{cases}$, еҲ?$\xi$ зҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣдёә ().
questions.analysis:
з”ұж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣзҡ„е®ҡд№үзҹҘпјҢ
$$
E(\xi)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x=\int_{-1}^1 x(1-|x|) d x=0 .
$$

жҸҗзӨә: дёҠејҸжңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘз§ҜеҲҶеҮҪж•°дёәеҘҮеҮҪж•?

questions.question: и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҮҪж•°дёә $$F(x)=\begin{cases} 0, & x<0 \\ x^3, & 0\leq x\leq1 \\ 1, & x>1 \end{cases}$$ еҲ?$E(X)=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis: з”ұе·ІзҹҘжқЎд»¶еҸҜзҹҘпјҢ $X$ жҳҜиҝһз»ӯеһӢйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸпјҢе…¶жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдё?$f(x)=F^{\prime}(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}3 x^2, & 0<x<1 \\ 0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$ пјҢжүҖд»?$E(X)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x=\int_0^1 3 x^3 d x=\frac{3}{4}$.

questions.question: иӢҘйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$\xi$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $\varphi(x)=\frac{1}{\sqrt{\pi}} e^{-x^2+4x-4}$, еҲ?$\xi$ зҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣжҳҜ ( ).
questions.analysis: з”ұдәҺ $\varphi(x)=\frac{1}{\sqrt{\pi}} e^{-x^2+4x-4}=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2 \pi} \times \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}} e^{-\frac{(x-2)^2}{2 \times(1 / 2)}}$, жүҖд»?$\xi \sim N\left(2, \frac{1}{2}\right)$, ж•?$E(\xi)=2$.

questions.question:
и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә
$$
f(x)=\begin{cases} 1-|1-x|, & 0<x<2 \\ 0, & \text{е…¶е®ғ} \end{cases}
$$
еҲ?$E(X)=( )$.
questions.analysis: $E(X)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x=\int_0^1 x \cdot x d x+\int_1^2 x(2-x) d x=\int_0^1 x^2 d x+\int_1^2\left(2 x-x^2\right) d x=\frac{1}{3}+\frac{2}{3}=1$.

questions.question:
и®ҫиҝһз»ӯеһӢйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ $X$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә
$$
f(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{ll}
k x^a, & 0<x<1 \\
0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ }
\end{array}\right.,
$$
е…¶дёӯ $k, a>0$, еҸҲе·Ізҹ?$E(X)=0.75$, еҲ?$k, a$ зҡ„еҖјдёә ( ).
questions.analysis:
з”?$\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} f(x) d x=1, \int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x=0.75$, жңү
$$
\int_0^1 k x^a d x=1, \int_0^1 x \cdot k x^a d x=0.75,
$$

еҚі
$$
\begin{gathered}
\left.\frac{k}{a+1} x^{a+1}\right|_0 ^1=1,\left.\frac{k}{a+2} x^{a+2}\right|_0 ^1=0.75 \\
\frac{k}{a+1}=1, \quad \frac{k}{a+2}=0.75
\end{gathered}
$$

еҫ?$k=3, a=2$.

questions.question: и®?$F(x)=P\{\xi \leq x\}=\begin{cases} 0, & x<0 \\ x^2, & 0 \leq x \leq 1 \\ 1, & x>1 \end{cases}$, еҲ?$E(\xi)=()$.
questions.analysis: жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰеҮҪж•°дё?$f(x)=F^{\prime}(x)=\begin{cases} 2 x, & 0<x<1 \\ 0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ } \end{cases}$, $E(\xi)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x=\int_0^1 2 x^2 d x=\frac{2}{3}$.

questions.question: и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ зҡ„еҜҶеәҰеҮҪж•°дёә $f(x)=\begin{cases} \frac{x}{\sigma^2} e^{-\frac{x^2}{2 \sigma^2}}, & x>0 \\ 0, & \text{е…¶е®ғ} \end{cases}$, е…¶дёӯ $\sigma>0$, еҲ?$E(X)=()$.
questions.analysis:
$\begin{aligned} E(X) & =\int_0^{+\infty} x \cdot \frac{x}{\sigma^2} e^{-\frac{x^2}{2 \sigma^2}} d x=-\int_0^{+\infty} x d e^{-\frac{x^2}{2 \sigma^2}}=\int_0^{+\infty} e^{-\frac{x^2}{2 \sigma^2}} d x \\ & =\sqrt{2 \pi} \sigma \cdot \int_0^{+\infty} \frac{1}{\sqrt{2 \pi} \sigma} e^{-\frac{x^2}{2 \sigma^2}} d x=\sqrt{2 \pi} \sigma \times \frac{1}{2}=\sqrt{\frac{\pi}{2}} \sigma . \end{aligned}$

жҲ–

$\begin{aligned} E(X) & =\int_0^{+\infty} x \cdot \frac{x}{\sigma^2} e^{-\frac{x^2}{2 \sigma^2}} d x=\frac{\sqrt{2 \pi}}{2 \sigma} \int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{2 \pi} \sigma} e^{-\frac{x^2}{2 \sigma^2}} d x \\ & =\frac{1}{\sigma} \sqrt{\frac{\pi}{2}} \cdot\left(\sigma^2+0\right)=\sqrt{\frac{\pi}{2}} \sigma . \end{aligned}$
